arts.ttl: 'I would like that': £25m Champions League star suggests Aston Villa or Newcastle move would appeal
arts.sum: He's keen on a switch to England...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa co-owner Wes Edens strikes £351m mega deal in the UK
arts.sum: Aston Villa co-owner Wes Edens' company Fortress Investment Group has completed the acquisition of UK pub and restaurant company Loungers, which owns chains like Lounge and Cosy Club, for more than £350m. Billionaire Edens ' Fortress have also previously acquired Majestic Wine, Punch Pubs and Vagabond, as well as cinema chain Curzon for around $5m.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa have been set €45m transfer fee with club 'willing to listen to offers'
arts.sum: With the January transfer window looming, Aston Villa have been linked with talented midfielder Felix Nmecha who was a figure in Borussia Dortmund's journey to last season's Champions League final. The Villans are amongst a host of Premier League clubs said to be interested in the BVB player who has begun to impress in Germany since moving to the Signal Iduna Park in the summer of 2023 from fellow Bundesliga side Wolfsburg.

arts.ttl: 'Really impressive': RB Leipzig boss singles out 'quality' Aston Villa star ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: Marco Rose knows his talents all-too well...

arts.ttl: Unai Emery names Aston Villa star 'every coach wants' as Champions League challenge outlined
arts.sum: The first is the team and tomorrow for them it’s an important match playing in Europe and the Champions League. To be consistent as a team is our challenge in this competition and in the Premier League and trying to play every match focusing which we need to get our performances and improve with the players and the team.

arts.ttl: Champions League | Predicted RB Leipzig XI v Aston Villa: Injuries his Marco Rose’s side
arts.sum: RB Leipzig remain one of four winless teams in the Champions League this season but they will look to change that when they host Aston Villa at the Red Bull…

arts.ttl: Aston Villa could unlock major FFP dream scenario after Guns N' Roses announcement
arts.sum: They aren't easy to put a price on, however, as the nature of concerts means the actual value of what the club can receive can even change on the night, as ticket and commercial sales are all considered and the numbers run by promoters and Villa staff during the event itself. With a capacity of 42,640 it is the biggest arena in the second-biggest city in the UK, and leverage both the location and the size of the arena to host such events can bring with it financial rewards for a club that has been seeking ways to create as much spending headroom as possible to be able to reinvest in what truly matters, the product on the pitch.

arts.ttl: I think Unai Emery's 'huge talent' is Aston Villa's answer to Man United legend
arts.sum: He would much rather be starting games, and I think to say that he’s best back-up striker or bench option in the Premier League is a bit disrespectful towards him. Former Aston Villa defender Richard Dunne believes that super sub Jhon Duran is the club's answer to Manchester United great Ole Gunnar Solskjaer amid his goalscoring exploits from the bench.

arts.ttl: Every word Morgan Rogers said ahead of Aston Villa's clash with RB Leipzig
arts.sum: "I want to be an established Premier League player, which I don’t think I am yet. The 22-year-old forward has played every one of Villa's Premier League and Champions League matches this season and could make his 21st appearance of the campaign against Leipzig.

arts.ttl: RB Leipzig striker makes feelings clear about Aston Villa star after pre-season bust-up
arts.sum: RB Leipzig striker Lois Openda says he has "nothing against" Diego Carlos heading into the Champions League clash with Aston Villa. "Aston Villa have a very good defence – they have only conceded once in the Champions League this season – but we have the necessary quality up front to score the goals," he said.
